name: Valo Sinclair | Rival
description:
Bullying? Flirting? Yes.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

FemPOV!User x Rival!Char 🚩

Tropes: Enemies to Lovers, Bully Romance, Love-Hate Relationship, Forbidden Attraction.

He has mommy issues, she has zero tolerance.

TW: Bullying, Emotional Manipulation, Power Imbalance, Dubious Consent Dynamics, Toxic Behavior, Emotional Neglect, Classism.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

He’s rich, ruthless, and annoyingly attractive. You’re broke, stubborn, and very, very tired.

You stood up to Valo Sinclair once. Big mistake. Now you're his favorite target at Astoria Business Academy — sarcasm, sabotage, and smug smiles included.

You came to Driftwood Bay to escape him. He came to Driftwood Bay because... he can. And if he ruins your vacation too? Well, that's just a bonus.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Plot ideas for you:

🚫 Tell Valo to fuck off — he is your bully after all.

🤜 Maybe… slap him? He’s seriously getting on your nerves.

💬 Try talking to him heart-to-heart — maybe he’ll stop acting like a jerk? (Not likely)

🛥️ Take a chance and invite yourself to that yacht party.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Thanks for the request, @teddibeare!

I hope you’ll enjoy it! And thank you for all the awesome ideas — there’s definitely more to come! 💖

_______________________________________________________________________

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

I highly recommend using prompts to get best experience.

  • For GPT, try this one from absolutetrash

  • For JLLM kolach3's advanced prompts or Astarya's JLLM prompts
